Cox proportional-hazards model for simulation data

Source: R/survival.R
cox_model.Rd

Cox proportional-hazards model for simulation data

Usage

cox_model(
  data,
  endpoint = c("role2", "overall", "ttd"),
  covariates = c("scenario", "injury_severity", "identity"),
  reference_scenario = "M-S00"
)

Arguments

data

A dynasimR_data object or casualty tibble.

endpoint

See km_estimate().

covariates

Character vector. Covariates entering the Cox model. Default c("scenario","injury_severity","identity").

reference_scenario

Character. Reference level for the scenario factor. Default "M-S00". Use "R-S00" for REHASIM.

Value

An S3 object of class dynasimR_cox with slots fit, tidy, ph_test, forest_data and params.
